            (BatchNorm): BatchNorm2d(192, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True)
          )
        )
      )
    )
    (10): Fire_(
      (group1): Sequential(
        (squeeze): Conv2d(384, 64, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1))
        (BatchNorm): BatchNorm2d(64, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True)
        (squeeze_activation): ReLU(inplace)
      )
      (group2): Sequential(
        (expand1x1): Conv2d(64, 256, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1))
        (BatchNorm): BatchNorm2d(256, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True)
        (expand1x1_activation): ReLU(inplace)
      )
      (group3): Sequential(
        (expand3x3): Block_(
          (mob): Sequential(
            (pointwise): Conv2d(64, 64, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1), groups=64, bias=False)
            (activation): ReLU(inplace)
            (depthwise): Conv2d(64, 256, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1), bias=False)
            (BatchNorm): BatchNorm2d(256, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True)
          )
        )
      )
    )
    (11): MaxPool2d(kernel_size=2, stride=2, padding=0, dilation=1, ceil_mode=True)
    (12): Fire_(
      (group1): Sequential(
        (squeeze): Conv2d(512, 64, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1))
        (BatchNorm): BatchNorm2d(64, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True)
        (squeeze_activation): ReLU(inplace)
      )
      (group2): Sequential(
        (expand1x1): Conv2d(64, 256, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1))
        (BatchNorm): BatchNorm2d(256, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True)
        (expand1x1_activation): ReLU(inplace)
      )
      (group3): Sequential(
        (expand3x3): Block_(
          (mob): Sequential(
            (pointwise): Conv2d(64, 64, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1), groups=64, bias=False)

            (BatchNorm): BatchNorm2d(256, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True)
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
  (classifier): Sequential(
    (0): Conv2d(512, 10, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1))
    (1): BatchNorm2d(10, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True)
